text.content: Canonical task database for the COO Twin system. One row per actionable item across all workspaces.

Task.description: The task description. Title property — keep it short and verb-led.

Status.description: Workflow state. /start-day filters out Done; /end-day flips items to Done.

Due.description: Due date. Items past Due AND not Done are flagged as overdue.

Assignee.description: Person responsible. Leave blank if self-assigned.

Workspace.description: Business unit this task belongs to. Drives department grouping in the daily briefing.

Priority.description: Optional priority hint. /start-day weights High items toward Top 3.

Last Activity.description: Free-text breadcrumb for sync — e.g. 'gtask:<id>' to mirror with Google Tasks.

Notes.description: Context, links, or scratch notes for this task.
